description: This file functions as a shim to forward management commands from the project root to the Django `manage.py` located within the `backend/` directory. It ensures that commands like migrate, repair_sqlite_migrations, and seed_demo_data are executed in the correct context by redirecting execution to the actual manage.py script inside the backend folder.

methods.name: None main()
methods.description: Main function that determines the path to the backend's manage.py and forwards execution to it, ensuring that Django management commands run with the proper environment.
